features.description: Indicates the time of day the image was captured, influencing lighting conditions and traffic patterns.
features.extraction_query: Determine the time of day depicted in the image. Options: 'Day', 'Night', 'Dawn', 'Dusk'.

features.description: Describes the prevailing weather conditions, impacting visibility and road surface.
features.extraction_query: Identify the weather condition shown in the image. Options: 'Clear', 'Cloudy', 'Rainy', 'Snowy', 'Foggy'.

features.description: Categorizes the type of road depicted, influencing speed limits and traffic flow.
features.extraction_query: Classify the type of road visible in the image. Options: 'Highway', 'City Street', 'Rural Road', 'Tunnel'.

features.description: Indicates whether pedestrians are visible in the scene, impacting safety considerations.
features.extraction_query: Determine if pedestrians are present in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: Indicates whether other vehicles are visible in the scene, influencing traffic density.
features.extraction_query: Determine if other vehicles are present in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: Estimates the level of traffic congestion in the scene.
features.extraction_query: Assess the traffic density in the image. Options: 'Low', 'Medium', 'High'.

features.description: Indicates whether lane markings are clearly visible, aiding in lane keeping.
features.extraction_query: Determine the visibility of lane markings in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No', 'Faded'.

features.description: Indicates whether traffic signs are visible, providing regulatory information.
features.extraction_query: Determine if traffic signs are present in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: Categorizes the type of traffic sign visible.
features.extraction_query: Identify the type of traffic sign in the image. Options: 'Speed Limit', 'Warning', 'Directional', 'Regulatory', 'Other'.

features.description: Indicates whether buildings are visible in the scene, providing contextual information.
features.extraction_query: Determine if buildings are present in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: Estimates the density of buildings in the scene.
features.extraction_query: Assess the building density in the image. Options: 'Low', 'Medium', 'High'.

features.description: Indicates whether trees are visible in the scene, providing environmental context.
features.extraction_query: Determine if trees are present in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: Estimates the density of trees in the scene.
features.extraction_query: Assess the tree density in the image. Options: 'Low', 'Medium', 'High'.

features.description: Describes the condition of the road surface, impacting vehicle handling.
features.extraction_query: Identify the road surface condition in the image. Options: 'Dry', 'Wet', 'Icy', 'Snow-covered'.

features.description: Estimates the distance at which objects are clearly visible.
features.extraction_query: Assess the visibility range in the image. Options: 'Short', 'Medium', 'Long'.

features.description: Indicates the overall level of illumination in the scene.
features.extraction_query: Determine the light level in the image. Options: 'Bright', 'Dim', 'Dark'.

features.description: Indicates whether streetlights are visible, providing artificial illumination.
features.extraction_query: Determine if streetlights are present in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: Estimates the angle of the camera relative to the road.
features.extraction_query: Assess the camera angle in the image. Options: 'Low', 'Medium', 'High'.

features.description: Indicates whether guardrails are visible, providing roadside protection.
features.extraction_query: Determine if guardrails are present in the image. Options: 'Yes', 'No'.

features.description: Describes the degree of curvature in the road.
features.extraction_query: Assess the road curvature in the image. Options: 'Straight', 'Slight Curve', 'Sharp Curve'.

features.description: Counts the number of visible lanes on the road.
features.extraction_query: Count the number of visible lanes in the image. Options: '1', '2', '3', '4+', 'Unknown'.
